name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Welcome back
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/why-im-thankful-467881?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| **_Welcome Back_** Before we came together with our families yesterday for Thanksgiving, on Tuesday Indiana’s state legislators – both re-elected and newly-minted – came together for a different reason. It was Organization Day at the Statehouse, the day when our legislators are officially sworn in and prepare for the new legislative session.

And this was an exciting Organization Day for Indiana’s supermajority of 67 House Republicans and 40 Senate Republicans. That’s because we saw the Indiana Senate's new leader, **Senate President Pro Tem Rod Bray** , officially take the reins following Senator David Long’s retirement. And under **Senator Bray’s** leadership, there’s a lot to look forward to in the Senate.

But perhaps the most exciting moment came in the House chamber, when** State Rep. Tim Brown **returned after his serious motorcycle accident earlier this year. It’s so heartening to watch his recovery, and I know he’ll make a big difference at the Statehouse in 2019, just like he always does.

The legislative session officially launches in January, with more great work serving Hoosiers on the horizon. -Kyle Hupfer

_**Photos:** Check out a few never-before-seen photos from the final week of the election, and relive the excitement as we worked toward victory!_
---
|
---

name: John Cusack
subject: First chance to get Bernie's new book!
body:
Senator Bernie Sanders' brand-new book Where We Go from Here
#
Friends,
Millions and millions of dollars will be spent today on holiday gifts for loved ones, but only a few people will see the profits from those earnings. There is an alternative to enriching individuals like the billionaire members of the Walton Family who own Walmart and have spent $4.7 million on lobbying in just 2018 alone.
Instead, you can make a contribution to Our Revolution and receive a special holiday package that includes Our Revolution stickers and Senator Bernie Sanders' brand-new book _Where We Go from Here_ on where the political revolution is going next.
[](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a708/bed43eb/8b972e64/75fc5dc7/3072556902/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-holiday-package?refcode=em181123-full&noskip=true")
Whether you plan to give this as a gift to a family member, friend, loved one (or that one cousin who still thinks climate change is a hoax), or read it yourself, your contribution will support Our Revolution, NOT billionaires.
Here are some examples of how your contribution will directly push the political revolution forward:
1. Grow our on-the-ground organizing efforts among more than 600 local groups across the country to build local and independent political power.
2. Build our peer-to-peer National Texting Program that has already connected more than 4 million supporters with information on how to register to vote, find their polling place, and volunteer at community events to get out the vote for progressives.
3. Execute our strategic program to pass Medicare for All in the House of Representatives.

**[Click here to make a $27 contribution and receive the Our Revolution holiday package!](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a708/bed43eb/8b972e64/75fc5dc7/3072556902/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-holiday-package?refcode=em181123-full&noskip=true")**
Thank you for all that you do to advance this movement. Whether you are making a contribution, volunteering, or having those difficult conversations with your relatives about the importance of investing in a Green New Deal or why health care is a right, not a privilege, we thank you.
In solidarity,
John Cusack
Actor & Activist
**[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a708/bed43eb/8b972e64/75fc5dc7/3072556902/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-holiday-package?refcode=em181123-full&noskip=true")**
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a708/bed43eb/8b972e64/75fc5dc6/3072556902/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a708/bed43eb/8b972e64/75fc5dc1/3072556902/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a708/bed43eb/8b972e64/75fc5dc0/3072556902/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a708/bed43eb/8b972e64/75fc5dc3/3072556902/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").
